title: End-to-end index one pilot open cohort (DepMap or GDC open-tier TCGA)
context: The M0 exit criterion requires one pilot cohort fully indexed end-to-end: gate-passed, fully cited, schema-valid, CI-green. The pilot must be a clearly-open, no-patient-data resource — either DepMap (CC-BY-4.0, entryType:cell-model-collection) or a GDC open-tier TCGA descriptor — so a real verifiable record is reachable without a third-party dependency. This is the proof-of-concept that the schema, gate, and validator work together. The deliverable is catalog metadata (never the cohort data itself). Depends on: schema-001, gate-003, validator-004, reviewer-002 (the reviewer must be named before this is reviewed).
objective: Prove the end-to-end pipeline (schema → gate → validator → record) by indexing one clearly-open, no-patient-data pilot cohort (DepMap CC-BY-4.0 or GDC open-tier TCGA descriptor) with a gate-passed artifact, fully cited fields, completeness score ≥ 90/100, and CI-green schema validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Pilot cohort is a clearly-open, no-patient-data resource: either DepMap (CC-BY-4.0, cell-model-collection) or a GDC open-tier TCGA descriptor; the choice is recorded with rationale.

The cohort passed gate-003 (access tier OPEN or OPEN-AGGREGATE; license permits reuse + derivative metadata; no identifiable/controlled data); the committed gate artifact (gates/<cohort-id>.json) records PASS with the access-tier classification, license rights booleans with cited clauses, and PII check result.
A complete canonical record is authored, every field populated with a fieldProvenance citation (source URL, retrieval date, and the specific claim); completeness score ≥ 90/100.
License snapshot recorded: committed text copy + SHA-256 + Wayback save URL of the license/terms as retrieved.
entryType is correctly set (cell-model-collection for DepMap; patient-cohort for TCGA open-tier descriptor) and aggregateCounts shape matches entryType.
identityKeys are set (primaryCustodian, programOrAccession, generationScope) per the cross-repository dedup rule; hostingLocations[] lists all known portal appearances.
Record passes schema validator and citation resolver; CI green.
Deliverable is catalog metadata (record JSON + gate artifact), never the cohort data; outputLicense CC-BY-4.0; DCO signed-off.
resources: DepMap release notes and CC-BY-4.0 license (https://depmap.org/portal/)
output: A committed catalog record (catalog/<cohort-id>.json) for the pilot cohort, fully cited and gate-passed (with gates/<cohort-id>.json), schema-valid and CI-green, licensed CC-BY-4.0, proving the end-to-end pipeline works.
